faq.q1Question: How does VisuTry's AI try-on work? (PT)
faq.q1Answer: VisuTry uses Google Nano Banana AI to analyze your facial features and realistically overlay glasses onto your photo. The AI understands face shape, lighting, and perspective to create natural-looking results in seconds.
faq.q2Question: Is my photo data safe and private?
faq.q2Answer: Absolutely! Your photos are encrypted during upload and processing. We never share your images publicly or use them for AI training without explicit permission. Free users' data is stored for 7 days, Credits users for 90 days, and Premium members for 1 year.
faq.q3Question: What's the difference between free and Premium quality?
faq.q3Answer: Free users get standard quality images (800×800 pixels) with a small watermark. Premium users receive high-quality images (1200×1200 pixels) without watermarks, plus priority processing and longer data retention (1 year vs 7 days).
faq.q4Question: Can I use the generated images commercially?
faq.q4Answer: Yes! Premium and Credits Pack users can use their watermark-free images for any purpose, including commercial use. Free users receive images with a watermark for personal use only.
faq.q5Question: How long does it take to generate a try-on?
faq.q5Answer: Most try-ons complete in 10-30 seconds. Premium users enjoy priority processing, which means faster results even during peak times. The exact time depends on server load and image complexity.

faq.q1Title: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.q1Answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access will continue until the end of your billing period.
faq.q2Answer: For monthly subscriptions, unused try-ons do not roll over to the next month. For credits packs, credits never expire.
faq.q3Answer: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee for all subscriptions. Credits packs are non-refundable once used.
faq.q4Answer: Credits never expire after purchase. You can use them anytime at your convenience. (PT)
faq.q5Title: What can I do with one grátis crédito?
faq.q5Answer: You can run one face analysis, one custom glasses try-on, or one armação inside Comparar. It is designed to let you test the workflow before buying créditos.
faq.q6Answer: We support all major crédito and debit cards, including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and more.
faq.q7Answer: You can contact us via email at support@visutry.com. Premium members enjoy priority support. (PT)

faq.q1Question: Can I try on glasses online from a screenshot? (PT)
faq.q1Answer: Yes. VisuTry lets you enviar your face foto and a glasses product image or screenshot, then uses AI to create a realistic virtual glasses try-on preview on your face.
faq.q2Question: Can I enviar my own glasses image for virtual try-on?
faq.q2Answer: Yes. You can enviar a product foto, store image, email screenshot, or a transparent armação image. Clear front-facing product images usually work best.
faq.q3Question: Can I try on glasses at home before buying? (PT)
faq.q3Answer: Yes. VisuTry runs in your browser, so you can try on glasses at home from a face foto and compare armação images before deciding what to buy.
faq.q4Question: What if I do not know which glasses to try first? (PT)
faq.q4Answer: Começar with AI face analysis to estimate your face shape and get armação recommendations, then return to virtual glasses try-on with a better shortlist.
faq.q5Question: How does AI try on glasses work? (PT)
faq.q5Answer: AI glasses try-on combines your face foto with a glasses product image or screenshot to generate a preview of the armação on your face. It is most useful after you shortlist styles by face shape, size, and personal taste.
faq.q6Question: Is VisuTry a try on glasses app? (PT)
faq.q6Answer: VisuTry works like a try on glasses app, but it runs in your web browser. You can use it on desktop or mobile without installing an app. (PT)
faq.q7Question: Can I try on blue light glasses online? (PT)
faq.q7Answer: Yes. If you have a clear product image or screenshot of blue light glasses, you can enviar it and preview the armação on your face before buying.
faq.q8Question: Do I need to install an app? (PT)
faq.q8Answer: No. VisuTry runs in the browser on desktop and mobile. Sign in, enviar your fotos, and start the glasses try-on flow online.
faq.q9Question: What happens after my grátis try-on?
faq.q9Answer: You can continue with a Credits Pack: 30 AI try-ons for USD 2.99, no subscription required. Credits do not expire. (PT)

faceAnalysisLanding.badge: Detector de formato de rosto para óculos

valuePoints.p1: AI face shape detector for glasses (PT)

table.title: Best glasses by face shape (PT)
table.description: If you are asking what glasses suit my face, start with face shape as a first filter. Use these armação directions to build your shortlist, then validate scale and style with virtual glasses try-on.

shapes.roundFrames: Rectangular, square, geometric, and slightly wider armaçãos
shapes.roundReason: Angular lines add definition and help balance softer curves. (PT)
shapes.squareFrames: Round, oval, thin metal, and softly curved armaçãos
shapes.squareReason: Curved shapes soften a strong jawline and reduce visual weight. (PT)
shapes.ovalFrames: Balanced rectangular, browline, aviator, and classic shapes (PT)
shapes.ovalReason: Oval proportions are flexible, so scale and personal style matter most. (PT)
shapes.heartFrames: Lightweight, rounded, cat-eye, and bottom-balanced armaçãos
shapes.heartReason: Softer or lifted shapes balance a wider forehead with a narrower chin. (PT)

faq.q1Question: What is AI face analysis for glasses? (PT)
faq.q1Answer: VisuTry provides AI face analysis for glasses by estimating your face shape and key visible features, then suggesting armação styles before virtual try-on.
faq.q2Question: Can AI recommend glasses for my face shape? (PT)
faq.q2Answer: Yes. AI face analysis can recommend armação directions for round, square, oval, heart, diamond, oblong, and triangle face shapes. Use virtual try-on as the final visual check.
faq.q3Question: Can I use a face shape detector online grátis before buying glasses?
faq.q3Answer: Yes. VisuTry lets you start with an online AI face shape detector so you can understand your likely face shape before choosing glasses. Use the result as a practical shortlist, then confirm the look with virtual try-on. (PT)
faq.q4Question: What is a face shape finder for glasses? (PT)
faq.q4Answer: A face shape finder estimates whether your face is closer to round, square, oval, heart, diamond, oblong, or triangle, then turns that result into armação styles to try first.
faq.q5Answer: Your enviared foto and analysis stay privado to your account. VisuTry uses the image to generate your face shape report and glasses recommendations.
faq.q6Question: What glasses suit my face shape? (PT)
faq.q6Answer: Round faces often start with angular armaçãos, square faces with round or oval armaçãos, oval faces with balanced rectangular or browline armaçãos, and heart faces with lightweight or softly upswept armaçãos.
